summary: SMB AI consulting shifted from docs to shipped agents.

findings.claim: 2026 SMB brackets: discovery 5-20k, pilot 10-25k, full build 25-60k, retainers 2-8k/mo. Raven 25-50k maps to full-build.
Dominant failure mode is pilot purgatory; root cause organizational, not technical.
findings.evidence: pertamapartners.com (MIT NANDA 95% no ROI, BCG 60% no value); aismartventures.com; uctoday.com.

findings.claim: Winning model is implementation-gap hybrid: business workflow plus shipping production agent in 30-60 days. ~88% of pilots never reach production.
Boutiques beat Big 4 on speed (2-12 wks vs 6-18 mo), cost (40-95% lower), access, ownership transfer.
Productized scales: micro 750-3k, audits 1.5-3k, AI ops 15-60k, above-platform 15-30k/mo, 80% standard, 40-80 clients/yr.

opportunities: Position as the implementation-gap hybrid for SMB finance/ops.
Productize 25-50k packages plus a run-the-agent retainer.
Sell the RavenClaude substrate as a governance premium.
threats: Commoditization by Claude Code agencies and no-code tools.
Big firms move down-market; solo capacity caps upside.
